evals.prompt: You are asked to change Remotion agent instructions or behavior. Before making any code or instruction edits, write agent-v evals that capture the required Red/Green/Refactor workflow and define a failing first step. Return the eval prompts and the first failing condition.
evals.expected_output: A set of agent-v evaluation cases and a TDD plan stating that no Remotion code or instruction changes occur until the evals exist.
expectations: Includes at least one agent-v eval prompt that describes the Red step in the TDD loop.
Specifies that no Remotion agent or instruction code may be modified before the eval definitions exist.
Mentions using agent-v as the test harness for the Remotion agent workflow.
Returns a minimal test-driven plan for the Remotion agent change.
